content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-15) but review_information uses placeholder credentials ("test"/"changeme") and notes.txt only says "TBD"
Pierre: Apple's reviewers cannot get past the sign-in screen with placeholder credentials like "test"/"changeme", and a "TBD" note gives no guidance on reaching gated features — this commonly triggers a 2.1 rejection for "unable to test the app." Please provide real, working demo credentials and replace notes.txt with concrete steps to reach core functionality behind the login. Also update the placeholder texts before submission since Apple explicitly flags generic test values.
